name: Ben & Jerry's New York Super Fudge Chunk
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the coarsely chopped chocolate, pecans, walnuts, and chocolate-covered almonds in a bowl. Cover and refrigerate.
2. Melt the unsweetened chocolate in the top of a double boiler over hot, not boiling water. Whisk in the milk gradually, heating while stirring until smooth. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. In a mixing bowl, whisk eggs until light and fluffy (1-2 minutes). Gradually whisk in sugar until blended (about 1 minute more).
4. Add cream, vanilla, and salt; whisk to blend.
5. Pour the chocolate mixture into the cream mixture and blend well. Cover and refrigerate until cold (1-3 hours), depending on your refrigerator.
6. Transfer the chilled cream mixture to an ice cream maker and freeze following the manufacturer's instructions.
7. After the ice cream is firming up (about 2 minutes before it is done), add chocolate and nuts, then continue freezing until ready.
Makes one generous quart.
